top_signals.title: Chinese Oil Imports May Never Fully Recover From Iran War
top_signals.summary: Chinese oil imports may never fully recover from the Iran war, with analysts saying the conflict accelerated a permanent shift away from fuels like gasoline and diesel.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Drops, Asia Stocks Gain as Iran Talks Progress: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Oil gave up early gains and Asian stocks climbed as investors welcomed signs of progress in diplomatic talks between the US and Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Emerging-Market Stocks Mark Fresh High as US-Iran Talks Progress, Oil Falls
top_signals.summary: Emerging-market stocks rose to a fresh record as the US and Iran agreed upon a roadmap to a final peace deal, indicating progress in talks that have proceeded in fits and starts amid threats by President Donald Trump.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan Insurers Sold Domestic Super-Long Bonds as Yields Soared
top_signals.summary: Japan’s insurers sold domestic super-long government bonds in May, reversing course from the start of the fiscal year as yields climbed to multi-decade highs.

top_signals.title: Asset Manager CSOP Lifts Options Cap for SK Hynix Leveraged Fund
top_signals.summary: CSOP Asset Management Ltd. is lifting a ceiling on the use of options in a $14.4 billion leveraged exchange-traded fund linked to South Korean chipmaker SK Hynix Inc., giving the fund manager more flexibility after a wild rally in the company’s shares.
